messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: One standing 'Approvals' Telegram topic aggregates every pending approval and is where the human approves/rejects
How it works: A newly pending ticket's approval ask is posted into the standing Approvals topic (not its BL topic) and names the ticket id
